# Copy-Pasta Prompts – E2E Gaps Follow-Up

Use this prompt to ask the agent to implement the plan.

---

**Prompt:** Implement the plan in `.llm/plans/active/e2e-gaps-followup/01-events-empty-state-and-admins-self-protection.md`. Do not edit the plan file itself. Add the events-list empty-state test and the admins-list self-protection test as specified. Run the affected specs to verify.
